_publications._publicationTitle: Chemical genetic screens reveal defective lysosomal trafficking as synthetic lethal with NF1 loss.

_contextSnippet: U87-MG cells were treated with DMSO, 2 μM Y102 or 50 μM HCQ for 24 h. At 30 min prior to the end of treatment, cells were stained with MitoTracker Red CMXROS
details: Successfully used for immunofluorescence imaging to visualize p62 expression, mitochondrial morphology, and oxidative stress markers in Y102-treated cells
